---
title: Sliders and Scrollbars
---

```{r}
library(gglite)
df = data.frame(x = 1:100, y = cumsum(rnorm(100)))
p  = g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |> mark_line()
```

Sliders and scrollbars allow users to zoom and pan through data.

## Slider on x

```{r}
p |> slider_x()
```

## Slider on y

```{r}
p |> slider_y()
```

## Slider on both axes

```{r}
p |>
  slider_x() |>
  slider_y()
```

## Scrollbar on x

```{r}
p |> scrollbar_x()
```

## Scrollbar on y

```{r}
p |> scrollbar_y()
```

## Scrollbar on both axes

```{r}
p |>
  scrollbar_x() |>
  scrollbar_y()
```

## Slider with a bar chart

```{r}
df = data.frame(x = paste0('Item ', 1:50), y = sample(1:100, 50))
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  slider_x()
```
